creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: dim
Date: Wed Sep  7 21:47:23 UTC 2016
New revision: 421523
URL: https://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/421523

Log:
  Make www/firefox build with libc++ 3.9.0, by adding patches for upstream
  bugs 1245076, 1268816 and, 1269171.  Together, these solve a number of
  problems with Firefox's generated wrapper headers for the C++ standard
  library.

  Approved by:	jbeich (maintainer)
  PR:		212431

Changes:
  head/www/firefox/files/patch-bug1245076
  head/www/firefox/files/patch-bug1268816
  head/www/firefox/files/patch-bug1269171
